---
title: "Jeffrey's Git Page"
---

# Welcome

Thanks for visiting! I'm Jeffrey -- a data scientist with a background in medical sciences and clinical research, now pursuing my Master of Data Science at the University of British Columbia.

This site is a space where I share my work and interests in Data Science, Machine Learning, and software development.

# [My GitHub](https://github.com/JeffHDing)

My GitHub page contains various repositories related to my projects and interests. Feel free to explore and contribute!

# [Projects](projects/index.html)

Check out my portfolio of projects spanning deep learning, data visualization, and full-stack applications.
